rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
generic_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
